title: CLI server mode
description: Given a data directory and schema, when I run virtuus serve, it should load data once and serve queries over HTTP. POST /query for dict-in/dict-out queries. Additional endpoints: GET /health (server status), POST /describe (schema metadata), POST /validate (referential integrity check), POST /warm (proactive refresh). Spec: features/cli/server_mode.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: set to in_progress. Done: kicked off server mode work and started reviewing server_mode.feature + existing CLI/query code. Next: implement serve subcommand + HTTP endpoints and add cucumber steps/tests. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: added Rust CLI serve subcommand + HTTP handling, and added server-mode cucumber steps in Rust and Python with helpers. Next: wire remaining server-mode behavior, run tests (cargo/behave), fix failures. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: in_progress. Done: server-mode steps green in Rust + Python; cargo test --test cucumber passed; Python behave for server_mode.feature passed. Next: decide on full behave run (still fails on pre-existing undefined benchmark/concurrency steps), update issue to done and prep commit. Blockers: full behave still errors due to undefined benchmark/concurrency steps.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: closed (kbs does not accept 'done'). Done: implemented CLI serve mode with HTTP endpoints (/query, /health, /describe, /validate, /warm), added Rust+Python server-mode steps with random port handling, added test cleanup, and fixed step matchers. Tests: cargo test --test cucumber passed; behave server_mode.feature passed; full behave still fails due to pre-existing undefined benchmark/concurrency steps.
